step_description: Query Store top consumers by CPU, duration, execution count
rows: INSERT INTO FactSales SELECT ... FROM StagingSales JOIN ...
SELECT o.*, c.* FROM Orders o JOIN Customers c ON ...
UPDATE Inventory SET quantity = quantity - @qty WHERE ...
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AuditLog WHERE created_at > @date
narrative_hint: Query 1842 is the ETL INSERT — 884 seconds of total CPU across 210 executions averaging 4.2 seconds each and reading 982K rows per execution. Query 934 has 3 execution plans suggesting plan instability. Query 1105 is a view-based report query reading 284K rows per execution — likely the source of the shared lock waits blocking APP_USER sessions. Claude should flag both the ETL job (rescheduling + MAXDOP) and the report view query (missing index or parameterization issue) as the two primary issues.
